name: Quick Garlic Butter Chicken
instructions: 1. Slice chicken. 2. Sauté garlic in butter. 3. Cook chicken until gold. 4. Drizzle with lemon.

name: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
instructions: 1. Rinse chickpeas. 2. Dice veggies. 3. Mix with olive oil and feta cheese.

name: Pan-Seared Salmon & Asparagus
instructions: 1. Season salmon. 2. Pan-fry salmon for 4 mins each side. 3. Sauté asparagus in same pan.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
instructions: 1. Blend tomatoes and cashews. 2. Sauté ginger-garlic in butter. 3. Simmer sauce with spices. 4. Add paneer cubes and cream.

name: South Indian Dosa with Sambar
instructions: 1. Soak rice and dal, then ferment. 2. Spread batter on hot griddle. 3. Prepare sambar by boiling dal and veggies with tamarind and spices.

name: Classic Chicken Biryani
instructions: 1. Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices. 2. Parboil rice. 3. Layer chicken and rice with saffron water and fried onions. 4. Cook on low heat (Dum).

name: Crispy Onion Pakoras
instructions: 1. Slice onions thin. 2. Mix with flours and spices to form a thick batter. 3. Deep fry small portions until golden brown.

name: Authentic Hummus with Pita
instructions: 1. Blend chickpeas with tahini, lemon, and garlic until smooth. 2. Serve with a pool of olive oil and warm pita.

name: Thai Pad Thai
instructions: 1. Soak noodles. 2. Stir-fry shrimp and eggs. 3. Add noodles and tamarind-sugar sauce. 4. Top with crushed peanuts and sprouts.

name: Guacamole & Homemade Corn Chips
instructions: 1. Mesh avocados with lime and diced onion/cilantro. 2. Slice tortillas and bake until crisp for healthy chips.

name: Japanese Ramen with Soft Egg
instructions: 1. Prepare broth with miso and dashi. 2. Sear pork belly slices. 3. Assemble bowl with noodles, broth, pork, and half an egg.

name: Palak Paneer
instructions: 1. Blanch and puree spinach. 2. Sauté ginger and chillies. 3. Add spinach and paneer cubes. 4. Finish with a touch of cream.

name: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
instructions: 1. Roast marinated chicken. 2. Make a rich tomato-butter sauce. 3. Simmer chicken in sauce. 4. Garnish with methi.

name: Rajma Chawal (Kidney Bean Curry)
instructions: 1. Pressure-cook beans. 2. Sauté onions and tomatoes with spices. 3. Simmer beans in the gravy. 4. Serve with steamed rice.

name: Falafel Wrap with Tahini
instructions: 1. Process chickpeas and herbs, form balls, and fry. 2. Spread hummus on pita. 3. Add falafel and drizzle with tahini.

name: Shakshuka (Poached Eggs in Tomato Sauce)
instructions: 1. Sauté peppers and onions. 2. Add crushed tomatoes and spices. 3. Crack eggs into the sauce and simmer until set.

name: Idli with Coconut Chutney
instructions: 1. Grind fermented batter. 2. Steam idlis in molds. 3. Grind coconut chutney with chillies and ginger, then temper.

name: Vietnamese Beef Pho
instructions: 1. Simmer beef bones with spices for hours. 2. Thinly slice raw beef. 3. Pour hot broth over noodles and raw beef to cook instantly.

name: Paneer Tikka (Grilled)
instructions: 1. Marinate paneer and veggies in spiced yogurt. 2. Skewer them. 3. Grill or bake until charred.

name: Gobi Manchurian (Indo-Chinese)
instructions: 1. Batter-fry cauliflower florets. 2. Prepare a spicy soy-based glaze. 3. Toss fried cauliflower in the glaze.
